name: obsidian-codex-plugin
description: Codex-native Obsidian vault maintenance for turning messy notes into a searchable, linked knowledge base.

interface.shortDescription: Let Codex maintain your Obsidian vault.
interface.longDescription: A clean-room Codex-native Obsidian wiki plugin that helps users write naturally anywhere in a vault while Codex organizes messy notes into sources, literature notes, permanent notes, indexes, entities, concepts, cited retrieval, lint reports, saved sessions, research plans, canvases, and methodology modes using filesystem-first helpers with optional transport detection.
defaultPrompt: Set up an Obsidian wiki vault.
Maintain and organize my Obsidian vault.
Ingest this source into my wiki.
Save this conversation to my wiki.
